name: TRACHEOBRONCHOPATHIA OSTEOCHONDROPLASTICA
definition: rare benign disease characterized by multiple submucosal cartilaginous / osseous nodules

demographics.Path: foci of submucosal hyaline cartilage with areas of lamellar bone
demographics.Histo: adipose tissue + calcified areas with foci of bone marrow; thinned normal overlying

scalloped / linear opacities surrounding + narrowing trachea (best on lateral view)
